A '''bruwose''' was a large lizard native to [[Moorja/Legends|Moorja]]. The lizards were effectively blind, using sound, heat and smell to navigate. They had large fore-paw talons, which they used to sift through soft rock while hunting small prey. They had pale skin, which provided little protection in fights.

Six months after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Dirk Harkness]] and the [[Black Curs]] landed on [[Moorja/Legends|Moorja]] after their reconnaissance of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. Harkness was trapped by three bruwoses in the [[Crumbling Lands]] while on his way to his hidden [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]]. He was rescued by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] agents shortly after.

==Appearances==
